text: Wandering these spaces—one open, sterile and almost intimidating in its emptiness, and the other vibrant, noisy with words and screens—I feel an odd tranquility, disrupted by the push and pull of curiosity and isolation. There’s a promise of connection in the display about human coexistence, but the empty glass walls remind me of how easily we separate ourselves. In this moment, I am both participant and observer, compelled to seek meaning in the blend of technology, thought, and silence.
